summary: Executed V0.8.5 M2 The Git Worktree Manager. Created src/mcp-server/src/worktree-manager.ts providing the core physical isolation infrastructure. Implemented async functions (createWorktree, commitAndPushWorktree, removeWorktree) wrapping the native git worktree commands. These functions handle headless sandbox creation outside the main project root, safely committing changes, pushing them to remote feature branches, and force-removing the sandboxes upon task completion. This sets the foundation for M3 MCP Filesystem Proxy interception.
